changes.before: The Baelgun camp arrival spent multiple paragraphs re-proving exhaustion, triage, and heat before the chapter turned south.
changes.after: The arrival now lands in one hard triage sweep and hands the scene back to urgency faster.

changes.before: Muradin behind the hide flap, offered warmth, and departure pressure were tracked across overlapping beats.
changes.after: The camp exit now keeps Muradin inside, one refused comfort beat, and immediate return to Dragonblight.

changes.before: Jaina's bread-smell contamination and Kel'Thuzad mirror were explained in a longer two-pass sequence.
changes.after: The contamination beat now lands once, keeps the wrongness on her skin, and moves directly to the insight.

changes.before: The Frostmourne weakness explanation circled the same mechanical point in several adjacent paragraphs.
changes.after: The seam logic now names the turn, the opening, and the three-school answer without the extra loop.

changes.before: Daggercap's return stacked multiple wreckage and labor details before Dagny took command.
changes.after: The harbor now anchors in one visual sweep and turns to Dagny's working authority immediately.

changes.before: The southbound crossing repeated the same overuse-cost point across several deck-labor paragraphs.
changes.after: The voyage now moves as a lean work cycle: push, feed, bleed, rework the spell, keep going.

changes.before: Jaina looked out over Daggercap's ruined mouth before the prose named Sylvanas's position and the sea read.
changes.after: The revised line goes straight to Sylvanas at the rail and the tactical sea read.

changes.before: Cyndia's shift to Jaina's flank used a notice/filter construction and an extra confirming sentence.
changes.after: The formation change now lands as action, Jaina's head turn, and no spoken protest.

changes.before: The village irony and relay update each took separate explanatory passes before the road push resumed.
changes.after: The relay note now hits faster and hands the scene back to motion.

changes.before: The eastern service arch briefing repeated the same plan burden across Jaina, Antonidas, and the magi reactions.
changes.after: The arch scene now keeps the plan, the cost, and the entry window, then cuts straight to the door.

flags: config.json's priming.styleTarget is placeholder text, and story-arc.md points to stories/the-plague-road/prose-sample.md, which is missing. Calibrated this pass against story-arc tone notes, the Jaina/Sylvanas voice sheets, editor-guide.md, and author-technique-anchors.md.
observations: Wordcount cut from 4665 to 3540, a reduction of 1125 words (24.1%).
Baelgun's camp keeps its ugly field-dwarf competence without lingering on duplicate triage beats.
Muradin's handoff still lands as loss, but the chapter no longer waits in camp after the decision to leave is made.
The refused warmth beat remains because it prices urgency in the body.
Dragonblight travel still reads hostile, but repeated bone-country inventory was reduced.
Jaina's bread-smell contamination stays because chapter 22 still needs Stratholme inside her body.
Kel'Thuzad remains in the chapter only where he sharpens Jaina's horror at her own method.
The Frostmourne-turn discovery now arrives in fewer steps and hits harder for it.
Cyndia's watchfulness stays visible through flank placement and bow readiness instead of extra explanation.
Dagny's harbor entrance now lands as command voice first, scenery second.
Daggercap keeps tar, kelp, char, and wreckage because those details do real grounding work.
The pigeon-warning sequence remains because it preserves the widening radius of failure beyond the ship.
Antonidas's first stone call is leaner and still carries the city's false triumph.
Jaina's answer about the three-part strike stays plain enough to sound spoken under pressure.
The southbound crossing now reads as labor, not as repeated proof that Jaina is exhausted.
Sylvanas's count-to-twenty correction was preserved intact; it still prices Jaina's self-deception cleanly.
Dagny's crew language stays practical and human; no dialogue-register contamination survived in quoted speech.
The shipboard spell rehearsal keeps the exact mechanical handoff the throne-room chapter will need.
The Southshore collapse sequence was reduced to the fall risk, the caught pride, and the immediate remount.
The POV turn to Sylvanas still lands cleanly at the section break because the prose shifts from pattern-work to route pressure.
Lordaeron's autumn softness remains because it makes the celebration rot worse.
The first village keeps the painted-prince image and cuts the surrounding repetition.
The relay note now does one job: prove they are a day later than they feared.
Antonidas's roadside briefing keeps only the facts that change the palace approach.
Sylvanas's road focus stays locked on time, gates, and whether enough mage remains in Jaina to finish the work.
Capital City still arrives under parade residue and routine guards; the normalcy now lands faster.
The eastern service arch keeps the illegal cold in the stone, the legal framing from Antonidas, and the cost question for Sylvanas.
The final entry beat now closes on the door and the loss of outside witnesses instead of pausing on repeated setup detail.
